name: punta-venta
description: Monorepo de Punta Venta: gestión web de ventas por vendedores, inventario, productos y reportes.

scripts.dev:db: docker compose stop api web && docker compose up -d postgres
scripts.dev:bootstrap: npm run dev:db && npm run api:prisma:generate && npm --prefix apps/api run prisma:migrate:deploy && npm --prefix apps/api run seed && npm run dev:doctor
scripts.build: npm run api:prisma:generate && npm run api:build && npm run web:build
scripts.test: npm run api:test && npm run web:test
scripts.qa:critical: npm run api:test:critical && npm run web:test:critical
scripts.api:test:critical: npm --prefix apps/api test -- critical-routes.permissions.test.ts auth.middleware.test.ts sales.service.test.ts products.import.test.ts reports.service.test.ts --runInBand
scripts.docker:up: docker compose up -d postgres api web
scripts.qa:local: npm run ci:validate-lockfiles && npm run api:prisma:generate && npm run api:prisma:validate && npm run api:build && npm run api:test:critical && npm run web:test && npm run web:test:critical && npm run web:build && npm run web:e2e:list && npm run web:e2e
scripts.qa:full: npm run qa:local && npm run web:e2e:integration:list && npm run web:e2e:integration && npm run docker:config && npm run docker:build
